items.title: Huge crowds fill Tehran streets for Khamenei's funeral procession
items.summary: Many people were waving Iranian flags and red banners symbolising vengeance for the former supreme leader's war death.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Iran to Bury Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in Holy City of Mashhad
items.summary: The city of three million people is home to a gold-domed shrine that Shiite Muslims revere as Iran’s most sacred site. The final ceremony will take place there on Thursday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.
